title: Designing durable agent memory
cleanText: Durable memory works best when active context is separated from retained knowledge and every saved item has a reason to persist.

title: Evidence-led founder storytelling
cleanText: Strong founder stories connect a concrete change to evidence instead of listing disconnected accomplishments.

title: Privacy boundaries for personal agents
cleanText: Public artifacts should be compiled from an explicit allow-listed representation rather than filtered at the final rendering step.
